response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years of experience, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Acme Software, and solid full-stack/cloud-adjacent background. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI/agentic work versus the 8+ years of production AI required, and there is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or customer-facing technical discovery at staff level. Worth a screening call to probe depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at Acme
Polyglot engineer (TypeScript, Node, Python-adjacent, DLang) with AWS CDK and microservices experience at scale
Track record of technical leadership, mentoring, workshops, and open-source platform building
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM performance/evaluation pipelines
AI/GenAI production experience appears limited to ~1 year, well short of the 8+ year bar
No clear evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery work with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
